description:
A map app prioritizing situational awareness and weather.
RoadTripRadar is a map app prioritizing situational awareness and weather. Live weather radar imagery on an interactive map, helping you see precipitation along your direction of travel at a glance.

Features:
- Distance rings centered on your location that adapt to zoom level.
- Navigate using bearing to your destination instead of rigid turn-by-turn instructions. Perfect for explorers and people who like to wander!
- Live animated weather radar from RainViewer with adjustable opacity and playback controls. Perfect for motorcyclists who want notice to reroute around a storm or gear up.
- Wind speed and direction
- Temperature and 1-hour trend
- Multiple map styles: Light, Dark, Auto, and custom colors for either.
- Speed readout with metric and imperial units, adjustable font size.
- Open source, no tracking, no accounts, no ads.
